steps.title: Track the contrast
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with "However," shifting from Marquez portraying cultural icons to Marquez portraying ordinary people. It then gives the concrete example of a young girl on a sidewalk.

steps.title: Name the sentence function
steps.content: A contradicts the shift away from famous figures. B is too broad because the sentence is about subject matter, not overall style. C invents collaboration. The remaining option identifies the everyday person example. The answer is D.
